title: Eranthemum vincoides
taxonomy: Eranthemum vincoides is classified as a species of flowering plant. It belongs to the family Acanthaceae, which includes various other plants commonly known as acanthus or thyrsoideae. This plant is native to Sri Lanka and is also found in other parts of Asia. It is a member of the genus Eranthemum, which comprises a group of flowering plants native to tropical regions. Eranthemum vincoides is further classified as a perennial plant with distinctive characteristics.
